method_of_supply_comparison.summary: No comparison could be performed. The supply_requirements dataset provided contains zero records. The DATA array supplied contains only funding_items records (4 entries from the Determination of Funding section). There are no supply_requirements items extracted from the Design Brief LV, HV or SL sections available in the provided data. Therefore, design_brief_requirements, site_plan_scope_found and missing_from_site_plan are all empty. To complete this comparison, supply_requirements records must be provided.

missing_from_drawing.note: No corresponding legend symbol found in reference_data for network switching, substation commissioning or contract inspection activities.
This is a catch-all funding item with no specific corresponding legend symbol in reference_data.

funding_arrangement_comparison.summary: Of the 4 funded works items extracted from the Design Brief Determination of Funding Requirements section, 2 have identifiable corresponding legend symbols in the drawing reference data: 'Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11' maps to the SPARE DUCT symbol (page 3), and 'Duct usage charge as required' maps to the DUCT WITH NEW CABLE symbol (page 3). The remaining 2 items — 'Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection' and 'All other works required.' — have no corresponding legend symbols in reference_data, indicating that these non-contestable and contestable works activities are not represented as distinct drawing symbols in the legend.
